content: DSM-5-TR criteria for GAD: excessive anxiety and worry about multiple events/activities occurring more days than not for ≥6 months. Individual finds it difficult to control the worry. Anxiety/worry associated with ≥3 of: restlessness/keyed up, easily fatigued, mind going blank/difficulty concentrating, irritability, muscle tension, sleep disturbance. Symptoms cause clinically significant distress/impairment in functioning. Disturbance not attributable to substance effects, medical condition, or better explained by another mental disorder (e.g., panic disorder, social anxiety, OCD, PTSD). Specifiers include in partial/full remission.
